{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Akura viewing platform
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Charity]] will watch the progress on the [[Akura viewing platform]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
